services.name: Dell Seton Medical Center at UT
services.notes: Level I trauma center, teaching hospital affiliated with UT Dell Medical School, comprehensive emergency and specialty services

services.name: St. David's Medical Center
services.notes: Full-service hospital, cardiac care center, Level IV trauma, 350+ beds

services.name: H-E-B Pharmacy
services.notes: In-store pharmacy at most H-E-B locations, competitive pricing, free select generics, drive-through at many locations

services.name: CVS Pharmacy
services.notes: 24-hour locations available, drive-through, vaccinations, MinuteClinic inside select locations

services.name: H-E-B
services.notes: Dominant Texas grocery chain, excellent prices, high-quality store brand, curbside pickup and delivery available

services.name: Chase Bank
services.notes: Full-service branches, financial advisors, ATMs, mobile banking. Largest US bank by assets.

services.name: Wells Fargo
services.notes: Full-service branches, wealth management, ATMs, senior checking accounts available

services.name: University Federal Credit Union (UFCU)
services.notes: Austin-based credit union, open to all Travis/Williamson County residents. Lower fees, competitive rates, community-focused. Largest credit union in Austin.

services.name: USPS Austin Main Post Office
services.notes: Main distribution center. Multiple branch post offices throughout Austin metro. PO boxes available. Passport services at select locations.

services.name: Texas RioGrande Legal Aid (TRLA) - Austin Office
services.notes: Free legal services for low-income residents including seniors. Housing, benefits, consumer protection, family law.

services.name: Volunteer Legal Services of Central Texas
services.notes: Pro bono legal assistance for qualifying residents. Wills clinics, tenant rights, senior legal helpline.

services.name: Austin Habitat for Humanity - Aging in Place Repairs
services.address: 500 W Ben White Blvd, Austin, TX 78704
services.notes: Home repair and modification programs for seniors and low-income homeowners. Ramps, grab bars, weatherization.

services.name: Home Depot / Lowe's
services.notes: DIY supplies and professional installation services. Senior discount days at Lowe's (varies by location).

services.name: Emancipet
services.address: 7201 Levander Loop, Austin, TX 78702 (and other locations)
services.notes: Low-cost veterinary clinic. Vaccinations, spay/neuter, wellness exams, dental cleanings at reduced prices. No appointment needed for many services. Nonprofit.

services.name: Thrive Affordable Vet Care
services.notes: Affordable veterinary care inside PetSmart locations. Wellness plans, vaccinations, sick visits.

services.name: Red Bud Isle
services.notes: Off-leash dog park on a peninsula in Lady Bird Lake. Extremely popular. Swimming access for dogs. Free.

services.name: Austin-Bergstrom International Airport (AUS)
services.notes: Major airport with domestic and international flights. Nonstop to most US hubs. Live music in terminals. 15-20 min from downtown.

services.name: CapMetro Transit Center
services.notes: Central hub for CapMetro bus and MetroRail services. Red Line to Leander. Project Connect light rail expansion underway.

services.name: Kroger family of stores
services.notes: Largest US supermarket operator; regional banners (Ralphs, Fred Meyer, King Soopers, Smith's, Fry's, etc.).

services.name: Aldi
services.notes: Hard-discount supermarket chain — nationwide.

services.name: Best Buy
services.notes: Largest US consumer-electronics chain.

services.name: The Home Depot
services.notes: Largest US home-improvement chain.

attractions.name: Zilker Park & Barton Springs Pool
attractions.description: 350-acre metropolitan park with natural spring-fed pool (68F year-round), botanical garden, and hike-and-bike trails
attractions.frequency: Daily 5:00-22:00. Barton Springs Pool $5 adults, $2 seniors.

attractions.name: Lady Bird Lake Hike & Bike Trail
attractions.description: 10-mile loop trail around Lady Bird Lake, popular for walking, running, cycling, and kayaking

attractions.name: South Congress Avenue (SoCo)
attractions.description: Iconic Austin strip with boutique shops, food trucks, live music venues, and eclectic restaurants
attractions.frequency: Shops and restaurants open daily, First Thursday events monthly

attractions.name: Blanton Museum of Art
attractions.description: University of Texas art museum with 21,000+ works, Latin American art collection, Ellsworth Kelly chapel

attractions.name: Barton Creek Greenbelt
attractions.description: 13-mile natural greenbelt with hiking, rock climbing, swimming holes, and dog-friendly trails
attractions.frequency: Open dawn to dusk, year-round. Swimming holes seasonal.

attractions.name: Live Music on 6th Street / Red River Cultural District
attractions.description: World-famous live music scene with dozens of venues, many with free shows nightly
attractions.frequency: Nightly, year-round. Major festivals: SXSW (March), ACL (October)

attractions.name: McKinney Falls State Park
attractions.description: Texas state park within Austin city limits with waterfalls, hiking, camping, and wildlife viewing

attractions.name: Lake Travis
attractions.description: 65-mile long Highland Lakes reservoir with boating, swimming, cliff jumping, and lakeside dining
attractions.frequency: Year-round. Best swimming May-October. Boat rentals available.

attractions.name: The Domain
attractions.description: Upscale outdoor shopping center with restaurants, entertainment, Apple Store, and Nordstrom

attractions.name: Congress Avenue Bridge Bat Colony
attractions.description: World's largest urban bat colony — 1.5 million Mexican free-tailed bats emerge at sunset March-October
attractions.frequency: Free viewing nightly at sunset, March-October
